name: divorce-financial-planning
description: Model the financial split of a divorcing household — QDRO division of 401k/pension/IRA, after-tax equalization of Roth vs traditional vs taxable awards, the equalizing cash payment, pension present-value split, home buyout vs §121-split sale, post-2019 alimony after-tax cost, MFJ→single bracket shift, and divorced-spouse Social Security (10-year rule) eligibility.
